title: defparam failing inside generate
body:
While trying to synthesise some Lattice example code, I notice that Yosys will fail to process a defparam if the defparam and module it refers to are in a generate block.

A minimal example (iCE40) is:
```
module top(input a, output b);

generate
if (1) begin

SB_LUT4 lut_i (.O(b), .I0(a), .I1(1'b0), .I2(1'b0), .I3(1'b0));

defparam lut_i.LUT_INIT = 16'h2;

end
endgenerate

endmodule
```
Which fails with the following error:
```
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `defparam.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
ERROR: Can't find object for defparam `lut_i.LUT_INIT` at defparam.v:8!
```
code_blocks:
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `defparam.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
ERROR: Can't find object for defparam `lut_i.LUT_INIT` at defparam.v:8!
